Title: Verify admin can approve awaiting transaction
Preconditions: User is logged in as Admin, User is on the Approvals page, Transactions with 'Awaiting approval' status exist
Steps:
Given I am logged in as Admin
And I am on the Approvals page
When I filter by year 2026
And I filter by 'Awaiting approval' status
And I click Actions on the first transaction
And I click 'Approve transaction'
Then I should see the confirmation dialog
When I click 'Approve' in the confirmation dialog
Then I should see a success message
Expected Results: Approval success toast message is displayed and transaction status changes to 'Approved'

Title: Verify admin can reject awaiting transaction
Preconditions: User is logged in as Admin, User is on the Approvals page, Transactions with 'Awaiting approval' status exist
Steps:
Given I am logged in as Admin
And I am on the Approvals page
When I filter by year 2026
And I filter by 'Awaiting approval' status
And I click Actions on the first transaction
And I click 'Reject transaction'
Then I should see the reject dialog
When I enter a rejection reason
And I click 'Reject' in the dialog
Then I should see a success message
Expected Results: Rejection success message is displayed and transaction status changes to 'Rejected'

Title: Verify admin can cancel approval confirmation
Preconditions: User is logged in as Admin, User is on the Approvals page, Transactions with 'Awaiting approval' status exist
Steps:
Given I am logged in as Admin
And I am on the Approvals page
When I filter by year 2026
And I filter by 'Awaiting approval' status
And I click Actions on the first transaction
And I click 'Approve transaction'
Then I should see the confirmation dialog
When I click 'Cancel' in the confirmation dialog
Then the dialog should close and transaction remains unchanged
Expected Results: Confirmation dialog closes and transaction still shows 'Awaiting approval' status

Title: Verify filter by status shows correct results
Preconditions: User is logged in as Admin, User is on the Approvals page
Steps:
Given I am logged in as Admin
And I am on the Approvals page
When I filter by 'Approved' status
Then all visible transactions should show 'Approved' status
Expected Results: All rows in the table display 'Approved' status badge

Title: Verify error message when approving without permission
Preconditions: User is logged in as regular User (no approval permission), User is on the Approvals page
Steps:
Given I am logged in as regular User
And I am on the Approvals page
When I attempt to approve a transaction
Then I should see an access denied or error message
Expected Results: Error message is displayed indicating insufficient permissions

Title: Verify pagination on approvals list
Preconditions: User is logged in as Admin, More than one page of transactions exist
Steps:
Given I am logged in as Admin
And I am on the Approvals page
When I click the 'Next page' button
Then the next page of transactions should be displayed
When I click the 'Previous page' button
Then the previous page should be displayed
Expected Results: Pagination navigates correctly between pages and displays different transaction rows

Title: Verify reject transaction without entering reason
Preconditions: User is logged in as Admin, User is on the Approvals page, Transactions with 'Awaiting approval' status exist
Steps:
Given I am logged in as Admin
And I am on the Approvals page
When I filter by 'Awaiting approval' status
And I click Actions on the first transaction
And I click 'Reject transaction'
And I leave the reason field empty
And I click 'Reject'
Then I should see a validation error for the reason field
Expected Results: Validation error is displayed requiring a rejection reason; transaction is not rejected

Title: Verify filter by 'Rejected' status
Preconditions: User is logged in as Admin, User is on the Approvals page, Rejected transactions exist
Steps:
Given I am logged in as Admin
And I am on the Approvals page
When I filter by 'Rejected' status
Then all visible transactions should show 'Rejected' status
Expected Results: All rows in the table display 'Rejected' status badge
